PTNT_DSCHRG_STUS_CD 
LABEL: 
Patient Discharge Status Code 
DESCRIPTION: The code used to identify the status of the patient as of the CLM_THRU_DT.

LONG NAME: PTNT_DSCHRG_STUS_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR

2
